# Personal Landing Page

## Description
*2–4 sentences describing what the project does, why it exists, and who it is for.*

This project is a personal landing page designed to showcase my projects, technical skills, and experience to recruiters and hiring managers. It provides a central place to highlight my work and demonstrate my abilities beyond a traditional resume. The site is built to communicate both my technical capabilities and my ability to work effectively in a team environment.

## Features
*A bullet list of 4–8 key features from the user's perspective.*

- One-page professional portfolio layout  
- Sections for Bio, Skills, Projects, and Contact  
- Showcases real projects including dashboards, machine learning, and data analysis  
- Clean and simple design for easy readability  
- Direct links to GitHub and LinkedIn  
- Organized project structure for scalability  

## Tech Stack

*A markdown table with two columns: Technology and Purpose.*

| Technology | Purpose |
|-----------|--------|
| HTML5 | Provides structure for the website |
| CSS3 | Handles styling and layout |
| JavaScript | Adds interactivity and enhancements |
| GitHub | Version control and hosting |

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites
*Everything the user needs installed before running the project.*

- A modern web browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox)

### Installation
*Step-by-step instructions to run locally.*

```bash
git clone https://github.com/lakem4/Lmauer1_PLP.git
cd Lmauer1_PLP
open index.html
